overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player character navigates neon-lit streets, covered walkways, and intersections with moderate traffic and pedestrian activity in a futuristic cyberpunk setting.

events.description: crossing the street and entering the covered sidewalk area with teal overhead structure

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the covered sidewalk on the far side

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated '01' and 'MILITECH' signage
curved elevated roadway structure with orange lighting
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
suspended traffic signals over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic urban intersection dominated by the Militech tower rising in the background. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while sparse traffic moves through the intersection, then transitions into a covered sidewalk area with a distinctive teal overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with teal overhead awning

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: overhead shelter structure with teal-colored panels extending along the walkway
safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the street traffic
tropical vegetation planted along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered pedestrian walkway beneath the teal awning, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction. The orange guard rail separates the walkway from the moderate traffic flow on the left, while palm trees and building facades line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with neon storefronts and signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past various neon-lit storefronts and displays

entered.detail: large blue neon sign reading 'FOURTH WALL'
tall vertical light structure with alternating pink and blue illumination
storefront display with mannequins and illuminated red coral decoration

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past commercial storefronts featuring prominent neon signage including 'NICOLA' and 'FOURTH WALL'. A jewelry store with an illuminated display window and red coral decoration appears on the right, while tall neon pillars rise in the distance. The teal awning remains overhead but shifts to the right as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with traffic signals

events.description: waiting at the corner for the traffic light to change while vehicles pass
beginning to cross the intersection as the traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner then proceeding to cross the street through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: red sports car with illuminated taillights waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing lines at the intersection
traffic signals suspended over the intersection showing red and green lights
cars stopped at the intersection including a distinctive red vehicle

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into another urban intersection. The camera waits at the corner as vehicles including a red sports car pause at the traffic light, then proceeds to cross through the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the opposite side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering urban intersection through a neon-lit pedestrian corridor and back into the open city streets. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath the looming Militech tower before transitioning into a covered sidewalk sheltered by a distinctive teal overhead structure. As the camera moves along this walkway, the view shifts from orange guard rails and palm trees to a series of commercial storefronts featuring glowing Nicola and Fourth Wall signage and an illuminated jewelry display. The path then curves, causing the teal awning to recede to the right as the camera approaches the end of the corridor. Finally, the scene opens back into a wide intersection where the camera pauses beside a red sports car before crossing another yellow-striped crosswalk toward the opposite side of the street.
